title: Mod-erate Loading Screen-Forge
description: This mod enhances the loading screen by adding falling mod icon animations. Additionally, the mod offers many configurable options.
body:
# Mod-erate Loading Screen-Forge  
This mod is the Forge port of [Mod-erate Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/moderate-loading-screen). Please do not report any crash logs related to this mod on the original mod's page. Instead, you can submit issues on our [issue page](https://github.com/MCTeamPotato/moderate-loading-screen-forge/issues).  

## Introduction  
This mod enhances the loading screen by adding falling mod icon animations. Additionally, the mod offers many configurable options.  

## License  
This mod is open source under the MIT license, just like the original mod.  

Example on the ATM9 modpack:  
![snowflakes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a08d36ffed232b81ca1fccbef304d5f7a2d33ec.png)
![stacking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b43e812974aa482c2e96b445aa54e74fe1f7dd89.png)
